title: athyrium scotinum
intro: Athyrium scotinum, also known as the Scottish lady-fern or lady fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium scotinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Athyrium scotinum is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
